task_description: Add Agent Knowledge Base system with CRUD for training data, implement 4-tier Agent Intelligence features (persistent memory, self-improvement, knowledge graph, hybrid search, health dashboard), and redesign README to professional quality inspired by Only-5 repository.

verification.summary: npm run build passes with all routes and pages registered (18 API routes, 7 pages). npx prisma db seed succeeds. Semantic review v2 APPROVED. No test framework configured so test_quality skipped. 3 minor non-blocking issues noted for future improvement (consolidation transaction wrapping, search query length limit, relations metadata validation).
